instruction: Find where JWT tokens are generated and modify the logic so the issuer claim is included.
Locate the Redis cache initialization and update it to enable key expiration.
Before touching authentication, identify the login handler and add rate limiting to it.
Search for the email sending function and update it so failures trigger retries.
Look up where the payment webhook is processed and add idempotency checks.
Check where the session middleware lives and update it to expire sessions after 30 minutes.
Find the code that uploads files to S3 and modify it so uploads larger than 20MB are rejected.
Locate the background worker loop and change it so failed jobs retry with exponential backoff.
Identify the API handler for product creation and add validation for negative prices.
Search for the cart update logic and change it so duplicate items increment quantity.
Find the password reset endpoint and modify it so reset tokens expire after one hour.
Locate where user emails are stored and normalize them to lowercase before saving.
Before modifying the worker retry strategy locate the queue consumer and update the retry logic.
Check where login failures are handled and add a counter for failed attempts.
Find the notification dispatcher and modify it to avoid sending duplicate notifications.
Search for the metrics exporter and update it to track request latency.
Locate the configuration loader and modify it to support environment overrides.
Identify the API gateway middleware and add request ID generation.
Find where API responses are serialized and update them to omit null values.
Search for order creation logic and enforce validation for invalid coupon codes.
Explain how JWT authentication works before we modify the token generation logic.
Describe the role of Redis caching so we understand why database queries are slow.
Explain how the job queue processes background tasks before changing retry behavior.
Walk through how the authentication middleware validates requests.

Explain how distributed tracing helps debug production issues.
